landing.heroAlt: Young Indonesian holding a phone between a yellow car and a yellow motorbike at golden hour
landing.tagline: Find a local driver, tap WhatsApp, agree the fare. No app needed.

driversBike.metaTitle: Drive with CityDrivers — Your earnings, your rules
driversBike.metaDescription: Join CityDrivers as a motorbike driver. Customers pay you directly via WhatsApp. No per-trip commission, no algorithm cutting your fare.
driversBike.heroAlt: CityDrivers driver on a yellow scooter at sunset in Bali
driversBike.heroParagraph: Customers find you, WhatsApp you, pay you directly. No commission.
driversBike.waMessage: Hi, I'm interested in joining CityDrivers as a driver. Can I get more info?
driversBike.howItWorksTitle: Three steps. No customer app required.
driversBike.howItWorksIntro: Customers don't need to install anything. They search, tap WhatsApp, and chat you directly. You set your rate, pickup location, and accept cash or your own QRIS.
driversBike.step1Body: Upload your ID, set your per-km rate, add bike photos. Verified within 24 hours. Your profile goes live in one business day.
driversBike.step2Body: Your profile shows up in Yogyakarta and Bali search. They see your rating, rate, bike type — and tap WhatsApp to book.
driversBike.step3Body: You and the customer agree on location and price by chat. They pay you directly — cash or your own QRIS. You keep 100%.
driversBike.whyTitle: Fair rules. Clear costs. You stay in control.
driversBike.diff1Body: Just {price}/month. No 15-20% cut on every order like the big apps take.
driversBike.diff2Body: Customers WhatsApp you directly. Build a repeat customer base instead of random algorithm orders.
driversBike.diff3Body: You set the per-km rate and minimum fee. No surge pricing dictating your earnings.
driversBike.diff4Body: A public profile you can share to your own WhatsApp contacts. Every share is a potential customer.
driversBike.earnSubtitle: One bike, two streams of income.
driversBike.earnPassengerBody: Daily rides, school pickups, after-hours runs. Set your per-km rate. Customers WhatsApp you direct.
driversBike.earnParcelBody: Out-of-town couriers, document drops, marketplace pickups. Often a higher per-trip value than rides.
driversBike.earnFooter: Opt into both from your driver dashboard. Customers pick the mode on the booking page, then see only drivers who offer it.
driversBike.pricingBullet2: Listed in Yogyakarta, Bali, Jogja customer search
driversBike.pricingBullet5: Set your own per-km rate and minimum fee
driversBike.pricingFine: No credit card required for the trial. Cancel anytime.
driversBike.finalTitle: Ready to set your own schedule?
driversBike.finalBody: Early founder drivers get {price}/month locked in for life. Price goes up for new signups once the early cohort fills.
driversBike.footerDisclaimer: CityDrivers is a directory and profile management tool — not a ride-hailing app. Drivers and customers transact directly, off-platform.

partner.metaTitle: CityDrivers Partner Program — Hotels, villas, tour operators earn 8%
partner.metaDescription: Hotels, villas, restaurants and tour operators: print a CityDrivers QR, refer guests to local drivers, and earn 8% commission per confirmed booking. Free to join. Driver pays you every 48 hours, directly.
partner.heroAlt: CityDrivers Partner — hotel and villa hosts earn 8% commission per booking
partner.heroParagraph: Print a QR, refer guests to local drivers, earn 8% on every confirmed booking. Driver pays you every 48 hours, directly.
partner.waMessage: Hi, I'd like to join the CityDrivers Partner Program. Can I get more info?
partner.whoIntro: If guests walk through your door and need a ride, you qualify.
partner.useCase1Body: Lobby QR, room cards. Guests scan, find a local driver, you earn 8%.
partner.useCase2Body: Table sticker. Diners going home or to the next stop tap to book.
partner.useCase3Body: QR on tour vouchers. Returning groups need transport back to the hotel.
partner.useCase4Body: Counter QR. Tired customers leaving the spa? One scan, one ride home.
partner.step1Body: Name, email, partner type. Active within minutes. No contracts, no monthly fees, no platform cut.
partner.step2BodyPre: Download a printable QR for rooms / lobby / tables and a shareable link for your website. Each scan tags that guest to you for
partner.step3Body: Tagged guest contacts a driver through CityDrivers. The moment the driver confirms, your 8% commission line lands on your dashboard.
partner.step4Body: Cash, GoPay, transfer, QRIS — your choice. CityDrivers never holds money. We're just the ledger.
partner.step5Body: If a driver doesn't settle within 48 hours they get a 24-hour grace warning. After 72 hours total they're deactivated from the partner-referred pool. You'll never be routed to defaulters.
partner.communityBodyPre: Every driver who joins the CityDrivers Partner Program agrees, in writing, that they must pay you within
partner.communityBodyMid: of each confirmed booking. They get a
partner.communityBodyPost: — every partner in our community skips them until they settle. We protect each other.
partner.safe1Body: We never hold funds, never take a cut of your 8%, never touch money between you and the driver.
partner.safe2Body: The 8% is a B2B commission against the driver's published rate — not an aplikator cut from the customer's fare. Clear under Perpres 27/2026.
partner.safe3Body: Print it. Place it. Display the 'Mitra Resmi CityDrivers' sign. (Avoid 'Pangkalan' / 'Rank' — those imply ride-hail operator status under PM 12/2019.)
partner.whatSubtitle: See every booking the moment a driver confirms.
partner.whatBullet1: QR code generator — print or share as image
partner.whatBullet2: Live ledger — pending, paid, overdue commissions
partner.whatBullet3: Booking-by-booking list with driver name + WhatsApp
partner.whatBullet4: Payout setup — cash / GoPay / transfer / QRIS
partner.whatBullet5: Driver deactivated after 72h overdue (48h due + 24h grace), one-tap reactivate
partner.pricingNoFee: No platform fee. No setup fee. Forever.
partner.pricingBullet3: Driver pays you direct every 48 hours
partner.pricingBullet4: Suspended drivers can't reach your guests
partner.pricingFine: Verification within 24 hours. No credit card. No contracts.
partner.finalTitle: Ready to monetize your foot traffic?
partner.finalBody: Print one QR. Earn forever. CityDrivers is the rails — you keep the relationship with your guest, the driver keeps the fare, you take 8% for the introduction.
partner.footerDisclaimer: CityDrivers is a directory and profile management tool — not a ride-hailing operator. The 8% is a B2B referral commission between you and the driver. We never set fares or hold funds.

driversCar.metaTitle: Drive your car with CityDrivers — Airport, rental, tours
driversCar.metaDescription: Join CityDrivers as a car driver. You set the rates. Customers pay you directly via WhatsApp. Built for airport transfers, daily rentals, and tours.
driversCar.heroAlt: CityDrivers car driver next to a yellow sedan at sunset in Bali
driversCar.heroParagraph: Airport transfers, daily rentals, tours — you choose. Customers pay you directly. No platform cut.
driversCar.waMessage: Hi, I'm interested in listing my car on CityDrivers. Can I get more info?
driversCar.offerTitle: Four ways to earn from one car.
driversCar.offerIntro: You decide. Show one service or all of them on your public profile. Customers contact you for the one they need.
driversCar.useCase1Body: YIA, Adisutjipto, DPS — fixed fare, customers reserve via WhatsApp, you confirm the pickup time.
driversCar.useCase2Body: Rent by the day, weekend, or week. You set the deposit and terms.
driversCar.useCase3Body: Yogyakarta, Bali, or cross-city tours. Day rate + fuel. You drive and guide.
driversCar.useCase4Body: Regular intra-city trips. You set the per-km rate and minimum fee.
driversCar.howTitle: Three steps. You stay in full control.
driversCar.step1Body: Upload ID, vehicle registration, car photos. Verified within 24 hours. Profile goes live in one business day.
driversCar.step2Body: Your profile appears in car search. They see your rates, car type, services — and tap WhatsApp to book.
driversCar.step3Body: Rate, time, location — all in chat. They pay cash or your own QRIS. You keep 100%, no platform cut.
driversCar.whyTitle: Your rates. Your customers. Your earnings.
driversCar.diff1Body: Just {price}/month flat. Daily rental at Rp 500,000? You keep all of it.
driversCar.diff2Body: Customers WhatsApp you for repeat bookings. Build regulars, not one-shot orders.
driversCar.diff3Body: Airport only? Daily rentals only? Tours only? All of them? Your public profile shows what you offer.
driversCar.diff4Body: A citydrivers.id/car/you page you can share to regulars, partner hotels, or Instagram.
driversCar.earnSubtitle: One car, two streams of income.
driversCar.earnPassengerBody: Airport runs, family rides, hotel transfers, daily rental. Set your per-km rate and minimum fee.
driversCar.earnParcelBody: Larger items, multiple boxes, inter-city couriers. Cars carry what bikes can't — often a premium rate.
driversCar.earnFooter: Opt into both from your driver dashboard. Customers pick the mode on the booking page, then see only drivers who offer it.
driversCar.pricingBullet2: Offer airport transfers, daily rentals, or tours
driversCar.pricingBullet3: Listed in Yogyakarta, Bali, Jogja car search
driversCar.pricingBullet6: Set fixed rates or per-km rates yourself
driversCar.pricingFine: No credit card required for the trial. Cancel anytime.
driversCar.finalTitle: Ready to make your car earn?
driversCar.finalBody: Early founder drivers get {price}/month locked in for life. Price goes up for new signups once the early cohort fills.
driversCar.footerDisclaimer: CityDrivers is a directory and profile management tool — not a ride-hailing app. Drivers and customers transact directly, off-platform.

driversTruck.metaTitle: Drive your truck with CityDrivers — Pindahan, distribusi, bulk parcel
driversTruck.metaDescription: Join CityDrivers as a truck driver. You set the daily rate. Customers pay you directly via WhatsApp. Built for pindahan, distribusi, and bulk parcel delivery.
driversTruck.heroAlt: CityDrivers truck driver at sunset in Yogyakarta
driversTruck.heroParagraph: Pindahan, distribusi, bulk parcel — you choose. Customers pay you directly. No platform cut.
driversTruck.waMessage: Hi, I'm interested in listing my truck on CityDrivers. Can I get more info?
driversTruck.offerTitle: Four ways to earn from one truck.
driversTruck.offerIntro: You decide. Show one service or all of them on your public profile. Customers contact you for the one they need.
driversTruck.useCase1Body: Household + office moves. Day rate + crew. Customers reserve via WhatsApp, you confirm date and load size.
driversTruck.useCase2Body: Hardware stores, building supply, market restocks. Set per-trip or daily rate. Regulars become weekly contracts.
driversTruck.useCase3Body: Shopee, Tokopedia, UMKM warehouses. Pickup + drop large daily volumes. Often a fixed monthly contract.
driversTruck.useCase4Body: Rent by the day, weekend, or project. You set the deposit, fuel terms, and driver availability.
driversTruck.howTitle: Three steps. You stay in full control.
driversTruck.step1Body: Upload ID, vehicle registration (STNK), truck photos, load capacity. Verified within 24 hours. Profile goes live in one business day.
driversTruck.step2Body: Your profile appears in truck search. They see your daily rate, truck size, services — and tap WhatsApp to book.
driversTruck.step3Body: Rate, schedule, load — all in chat. They pay cash, transfer, or your own QRIS. You keep 100%, no platform cut.
driversTruck.whyTitle: Daily rates. Big jobs. Regular contracts.
driversTruck.diff1Body: Just {price}/month flat. Pindahan job at Rp 800,000? You keep all of it.
driversTruck.diff2Body: Built for bigger jobs. Quote per day, per project, or per weekly contract — not per kilometre.
driversTruck.diff3Body: Pindahan, distribusi, building supply, bulk parcel for Shopee sellers. Higher ticket than per-km transport.
driversTruck.diff4Body: A citydrivers.id/truck/you page you can share to repeat clients, supply contracts, or distributor groups.
driversTruck.typicalTitle: One booking can pay for the week.
driversTruck.typicalSubtitle: Truck work is fewer jobs, bigger margins — not the per-km grind.
driversTruck.metric1Sub: Per-day quote. Driver-set, no surge cap.
driversTruck.metric2Sub: One household move. Day rate + crew.
driversTruck.metric3Sub: Bulk parcel for one UMKM seller.
driversTruck.earnTitle: Moving jobs and bulk parcel — one truck.
driversTruck.earnSubtitle: One truck, two streams of income.
driversTruck.earnPassengerBody: Household moves, hardware deliveries, market supply runs. Day rate + crew. Customers book by date, not by kilometre.
driversTruck.earnParcelBody: Shopee sellers, Tokopedia warehouses, large daily volumes. Often weekly or monthly contracts — stable repeat income.
driversTruck.earnFooter: Opt into both from your driver dashboard. Customers pick the mode on the booking page, then see only drivers who offer it.
driversTruck.pricingBullet2: Offer pindahan, distribusi, or bulk parcel contracts
driversTruck.pricingBullet3: Listed in Yogyakarta, Bali, Jogja truck search
driversTruck.pricingBullet6: Set daily rates, project rates, or contracts yourself
driversTruck.pricingFine: No credit card required for the trial. Cancel anytime.
driversTruck.finalTitle: Ready to make your truck earn?
driversTruck.finalBody: Early founder drivers get {price}/month locked in for life. Price goes up for new signups once the early cohort fills.
driversTruck.footerDisclaimer: CityDrivers is a directory and profile management tool — not a ride-hailing app. Drivers and customers transact directly, off-platform.

hero.body: Your customers are scrolling, searching, asking — every second of every day. Kita2u puts your business in their hands, on their feed, and at the top of Google so the answer is always yes.

setup.intro: Upload, copy, share. That's it — and the platform does the SEO work in the background while you get on with the day.

step1.headline: Upload your products
step1.body: Add photos, prices, hours. No designer needed — your page builds itself as you fill in the blanks.

step2.headline: Copy your link
step2.body: One short kita2u link is yours instantly. Paste it anywhere — bio, business card, status, flyer.

step3.headline: Share to every social
step3.body: TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp — one link, every platform. Your customers tap once and land directly on you.

seo.body1: Every day, Google crawls your Kita2u page. The more your link is shared, the higher it climbs in search. After a few weeks, customers start finding you without you doing anything — they searched for your service, your city, your category, and you were already there.
seo.body2a: That's the difference between an account on someone else's platform and a page that's
seo.body2b: . Yours grows. Yours compounds. Yours stays.

card.title: Climbing daily
card.disclaimer: Indicative. Actual ranking depends on category, geography, and how often you share your link.

goodbye.body: The marketplace giants take a cut of every sale, hide your customers behind their algorithm, and bury you the moment they change the rules. Your business deserves a real address — not a stall in someone else's mall.
goodbye.tagline: Your link. Your customers. Your rules. Always.

pillars.intro: The infrastructure of a serious app. The price of one weekly coffee. The team that ships your edits the same day.

global.headline: Proven across the globe
global.body: High-performance Kita2u pages live in dozens of countries — and rank on the first Google page within weeks.

seo.headline: Top Google SEO build
seo.body: Every page is optimised end to end — speed, mobile, semantic markup, structured data. You inherit it for free.

team.headline: A team that stays close
team.body: Real humans on WhatsApp, answering within hours. Tell us what you want — chances are we will adjust it the same day.

cta.bodyA: Your customers are out there, looking. Five minutes is all you need to make sure they find
cta.disclaimer: No credit card required · Cancel in one tap from your dashboard side drawer
